$statusLegend.ported: byte-equivalent to upstream (CI fails on drift)
$statusLegend.adapted: TypeScript port and/or namespace swap; logically equivalent
$statusLegend.extended: fork adds behavior on top of upstream
$statusLegend.added: file unique to the fork (no upstream)

files.notes: name + textdomain swapped to artisanpack namespace; supports/attributes verbatim.
TypeScript port; upstream `useDeprecatedTextAlign` hook is replaced by the inline migrate-text-align deprecation path so the heading edit doesn't reach into block-library private utilities.
Full 6-entry chain ported verbatim (v6 → v1). Imports the shared migrate-text-align primitive from blocks/_shared/.

Upstream raw/prefix/enter transforms preserved (namespaced to artisanpack/heading); added bidirectional block transforms for core/heading ↔ artisanpack/heading and accepts artisanpack/paragraph as a from-source.
Inline SVG for the inserter (editor doesn't bundle dashicons).
Adapted to the visual-editor auto-discovery contract (custom-blocks.ts glob). Upstream index.js wires `init` and PHP server-side init; we don't need either.

knownDivergences: transforms.ts adds bidirectional block transforms with core/heading and accepts artisanpack/paragraph as a paragraph source.
edit.tsx omits the upstream `useDeprecatedTextAlign` hook; the deprecation chain handles the legacy `align` attribute migration on load.
